title: WE BUILD - Membership Credential - SD-JWT VC payload
description: Schema for the SD-JWT VC payload of a Membership Credential as defined in the rb-membership Rulebook (Chapter 3.2). This models the JSON claims set prior to SD-JWT disclosure/packing, aligned with the catalog baseline of HAIP draft-03 and SD-JWT VC draft -09.

iss.description: Issuer identifier. For the SD-JWT VC profile this is normally the onboarding service provider HTTPS URL.

iat.description: Issued-at timestamp as a JWT NumericDate.

nbf.description: Not-before timestamp as a JWT NumericDate, where used.

exp.description: Expiration timestamp as a JWT NumericDate.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type for the Membership Credential.

attestation_legal_category.description: Legal category of the attestation. In EBWV v0.1, EAA denotes the non-qualified Electronic Attestation of Attributes category.

id.description: DID of the credential subject. DS-specific name retained for interoperability.

holderIdentifier.description: Stable holder identifier. For the MVP this re-uses the EUID from the EUBWOID.

holderIdentifierType.description: Conditional future enhancement for distinguishing Legal Person from Natural Person holder identifiers.

legalName.description: Optional official name of the holder.

memberOf.description: DSI or dataspace membership value. Values are governed by the relevant DSI or dataspace.

roles.description: Non-empty array of roles the holder has within the DSI or dataspace.

governanceRulebook.description: Reference to the online dataspace governance rulebook.

rulebookVersion.description: Version of the online rulebook at the time of acceptance.

rulebookHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the rulebook, represented as 64 hexadecimal characters.

rulebookAcceptedAt.description: Datetime when the rulebook was accepted, where present.

onboardedBy.description: Partner or service provider that onboarded the holder.

id.description: DID identifying the partner that onboarded the holder.

holderIdentifier.description: Stable holder identifier used within the onboarding DSI or dataspace, where different from the top-level holderIdentifier.

platform.description: Commercial name of the DSI or partner that onboarded the holder.

organisation.description: Legal name of the organisation that onboarded the holder and hosts the platform.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential that contains the status bitstring.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring for this credential.

cnf.description: Confirmation claims per SD-JWT VC. Used when the credential is holder-bound.

jwk.description: Public key bound to the holder.
